agentAccountWasmHashNote: v1 (8c607112ba…dda62) pins the pre-seeded demoAgentAccount below and is kept for history. v2 (7ced45e735…ca717, see fundingRouter.agentWasmHashV2) adds the 4th constructor arg (router Option<Address>) + the pull@router context; it is what the one-popup grant factory and the per-run auto-execute deploys now use (frontend SOROBAN_AGENT_WASM_HASH).
demoAgentNote: v3 (cutover, handoff §1): fresh agent_account deploy (tx e1d37ff8c38bd9067d6e54d7098063a15adbd66e8a6158c1d08479c075354dad) because the account's __check_auth scope is constructor-only — the v2 agent (CD3MQJ4YZQ5MDSKDETEFZMDV5J5URVXM46NY5Y3RICUOVJJOFIZTKJ7K) stays hard-pinned to the OLD 1:1 vault and cannot be re-scoped. v3 pins scope.vault = autofarmVault, reuses the SAME session signer pubkey (DEMO_AGENT_SECRET unchanged), constructor self-approved the autofarm vault for the 100k cap, and was registry-authorized in tx f6eb998268dbce07e3c5b0611eb767e1f671e7f950fd2ae8a3713eff8b35aa78.

fundingRouter.note: One-popup grant factory + funding gate (zero custody). Constructor pins (agent wasm v2 hash 7ced45e7…ca717, token). owner.grant() is the single wallet popup (covers the nested SEP-41 token.approve + deploys the run's agents via the pinned wasm); relayed router.pull() funds each agent within the token allowance — the router never holds funds. The server relay guard's SOROBAN_ROUTER_ADDRESS env must equal address or grant/pull fee-bumps are refused. Deployer: vf-deployer (GCIOUP4U…RYHNS).

vault.note: PRE-autofarm vault (dividend-model wasm, predates add_strategy/set_keeper/compound/rebalance). Kept for history/rollback — superseded by `autofarmVault` below (Task 11, sub-project vf-autofarm).

autofarmVault.name: Vibing Farmer Autofarm
autofarmVault.keeperNote: Dedicated keeper identity (review fix: split from the relayer). set_keeper tx 5690e99bfe84740106c7ae015e82f2fb4b54fb99a4bb2ab988db4e05f9e73be9. Secret lives ONLY in frontend/.env.local STELLAR_KEEPER_SECRET (local) / wrangler secret (deployed keeper).
autofarmVault.wasmUpgradeNote: Live vault wasm upgraded (review fixes: compound try_-call fault isolation + compound cooldown 600s + zero-move rebalance guard), wasm hash 1b54f98906fc8dcb3f44d240ebccd4d5ba3f5f15ef0c47a14a3711e6b04ce186, upgrade tx ae31d87aa35c3c2d2232aea096dad9bd29089372cb9e1917e97782bd55018e48. Storage verified intact post-upgrade (keeper/pps/strategies reads).
autofarmVault.note: Task 11 (sub-project vf-autofarm) deploy. Single-strategy: Task 1 spike found OWN_POOL_VIABLE=false (a self-deployed second Blend pool can't reach Active status without seeding real backstop capital), so this vault runs strategy1 only and relies on the de-risk-to-idle rebalance fallback (rebalance(to=vault)) instead of a second strategy/pool. Deploy tx 492d55911c49eecffe3aba01f5d49f70de56e66ce3f960fab85d950c208e2055; round-trip (1 USDC deposit+redeem) verified live via deployer key, tx f788a432c823d0b6e7ab4d8923bb1dedd44fb7e38c37378aed79143eba3f5334 + 4a650b9ceb3268bfcfbb7cbc3090107998c60df9c2a695b72f8e595e1476dd70.

smartAccount.source: reused live bindings-0.1.2 demo-env testnet artifacts (not self-deployed); v0.7.2 tag drifted to get_context_rules_count and does NOT match bindings 0.1.2
